testcase.name: verifyPAYOPRegistration

failure.message:
Error { message='Error: strict mode violation: locator("//input[@placeholder='Search...']") resolved to 2 elements: 1) <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 pr-8 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid"/> aka locator("#subsidyApprovedBy").getByRole(AriaRole.TEXTBOX, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Search...")) 2) <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 pr-8 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 ng-pristine ng-valid ng-touched"/> aka locator("#subsidyReason").getByRole(AriaRole.TEXTBOX, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Search..."))
name='Error stack='Error: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//input[@placeholder='Search...']") resolved to 2 elements: 1) <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 pr-8 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid"/> aka locator("#subsidyApprovedBy").getByRole(AriaRole.TEXTBOX, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Search...")) 2) <input type="text" placeholder="Search..." class="w-full border border-gray-300 rounded px-2 py-1 pr-8 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 ng-pristine ng-valid ng-touched"/> aka locator("#subsidyReason").getByRole(AriaRole.TEXTBOX, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Search..."))

testcase.failure:
